themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "מֶֽלֶךְ: king - a king".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 22 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: בָּֽעֲל֥וּ: who had the dominion - to be master; hence, to marry

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 23 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: הַמֶּ֥לֶךְ: with the king - a king

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 31 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: מְלֹ֥ךְ: unto the reign - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel

themes.label: Peace/Rest

Word-study detail reinforces "וְשֹׁקֶ֖טֶת: and quiet - to repose (usually figurative)".
